evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Write comprehensive data quality checks, tests, and monitoring scripts to ensure the accuracy, completeness, and reliability of all transformed data assets.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Explicit ownership of comprehensive quality checks, tests, and monitoring reflects a rigour-dominant framing focused on data reliability.
evidence.domain_risk: focusing on transforming raw data into high-quality, trustworthy, and easily consumable datasets and visualisations for business users
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The data supports business-user decisions but there is no regulatory or financial-reporting stake mentioned, matching moderate risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: Work closely with Data Analysts; Collaborate with Data Engineers on data ingestion strategies and platform optimisation
evidence.data_team_maturity: transform raw data loaded into our data warehouse (Snowflake) into clean, ready-to-use data models
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An established warehouse (Snowflake) already receiving raw data indicates an existing stack that the role helps actively grow, matching mid maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Build scalable, compelling data visualisations in Looker that can be used by large teams
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD names a specific tool (Looker) and concrete scale expectations, reflecting hiring-manager detail mixed with more generic responsibilities elsewhere, matching mixed authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: transforming raw data into high-quality, trustworthy, and easily consumable datasets and visualisations for business users
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role's purpose is framed around serving internal business users with trustworthy data assets, matching internal_data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design, develop, and maintain efficient and scalable workflows using tools like dbt to transform raw data loaded into our data warehouse (Snowflake) into clean, ready-to-use data models.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The scope is defined (transform data already loaded into the warehouse into ready-to-use models), representing delivery of scoped work rather than setting overall direction, matching execution autonomy.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design, develop, and maintain efficient and scalable workflows using tools like dbt to transform raw data loaded into our data warehouse (Snowflake) into clean, ready-to-use data models
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The JD mixes designing new workflows with maintaining and scaling existing warehouse transformations, combining new-build and extend/fix elements, matching mixed.
evidence.work_arrangement: IRL-first approach to work, where our team works together in-person 3 days a week
evidence.ai_role: Design, develop, and maintain efficient and scalable workflows using tools like dbt to transform raw data loaded into our data warehouse (Snowflake) into clean, ready-to-use data models
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI coding tools, GenAI responsibilities, or text-to-SQL infrastructure mentioned; standard dbt transformation work.
evidence.testing_framing: Write comprehensive data quality checks, tests, and monitoring scripts to ensure the accuracy, completeness, and reliability of all transformed data assets
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate owns quality practice with explicit ownership verbs (write, ensure) applied to testing and monitoring outcomes.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: focusing on transforming raw data into high-quality, trustworthy, and easily consumable datasets and visualisations for business users
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Reliability and trustworthiness framed as operational quality concerns, not compliance or regulatory drivers.
